purpose: Human-maintained log of which sites are wrong/outdated for which partner skill facts. Update as screenshots and in-game checks accumulate. Separate from auto cross-source-diff.json.

game8.value: Allows Lamball to be used as a shield. When assigned to the Ranch, Lamball produces Wool.

wiki-gg.value: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Game8 softens activation wording and says Lamball produces Wool instead of sometimes drops Wool.

game8.value: Increases the player's max carrying capacity by a small amount while Cattiva is on the team.

wiki-gg.value: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

paldb.value: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

entries.correctValue: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100. (Does not stack)
entries.notes: In-game Palpedia shows fixed +100 and (Does not stack). wiki-gg says team and omits number. paldb uses range (100~200). fandom carry table 50-90 conflicts with shown 100.

game8.value: When assigned to the Ranch, Chikipi produces Eggs.

wiki-gg.value: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

paldb.value: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

entries.correctValue: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.
entries.notes: Game8 says produces Eggs instead of sometimes lays an Egg.
